kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: CT01 — Usuário sem medicamentos cadastrados

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

test.doc: Cards devem exibir zeros para usuário sem medicamentos

test.name: CT02 — Usuário com medicamentos, sem doses hoje

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

test.doc: stat-hoje deve ser 0 quando não há doses programadas para hoje

test.name: CT03 — Doses programadas hoje, sem registros no mês

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

test.doc: stat-hoje maior que 0, tomadas e perdidas zerados

test.name: CT04 — Doses programadas e registradas no mês

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: stat-tomadas maior que 0 e adesão exibe percentual

test.name: CT05 — Todas as doses do mês foram tomadas

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: The text of element 'id=stat-adesao' should have been '100%' but it was '—'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
kw.status: The text of element 'id=stat-adesao' should have been '100%' but it was '—'.

test.doc: stat-perdidas deve ser 0 e adesão deve ser 100%
test.status: The text of element 'id=stat-adesao' should have been '100%' but it was '—'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
